Footer.description: Area36 offers comfort and unforgettable stays in handpicked luxury villas across the Caucasus.

Hero.subtitle: Experience comfort, luxury, and unforgettable moments in premium mountain homes located in the breathtaking nature of the Caucasus.

royal-chalet.title: Area36 Royal Chalet
royal-chalet.description: 4 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms, scenic terrace, and a large pool – perfect for 8 guests.
royal-chalet.alt: Area36 Royal Chalet — luxury 4-bedroom chalet with pool in Gabala, Azerbaijan

family-chalet.title: Area36 Family Chalet
family-chalet.description: 3 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, and a heated pool – ideal for a cozy stay.
family-chalet.alt: Area36 Family Chalet — cozy 3-bedroom chalet with heated pool in Gabala, Azerbaijan

golden-loft.title: Area36 Golden Loft
golden-loft.description: Charming chalet with 2 spacious bedrooms, 2 modern bathrooms, a heated pool, and a welcoming living area for your comfort.
golden-loft.alt: Area36 Golden Loft — charming 2-bedroom chalet with heated pool in Gabala, Azerbaijan

milano-deluxe.title: Area36 Milano Deluxe
milano-deluxe.description: 4 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms – comfortably accommodates up to 9 guests.
milano-deluxe.alt: Area36 Milano Deluxe — spacious 4-bedroom luxury chalet for 9 guests in Gabala, Azerbaijan

area36-royal-chalet.title: Area36 Royal Chalet
area36-royal-chalet.description: A stylish chalet with 4 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms, a large pool, terrace, and stunning views. Perfect for up to 8 guests seeking comfort and relaxation.

area36-family-chalet.title: Area36 Family Chalet
area36-family-chalet.description: A cozy chalet with 3 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, and a heated pool. Perfect for a relaxing getaway in a tranquil natural setting.

area36-golden-loft.title: Area36 Golden Loft
area36-golden-loft.description: Charming chalet with 2 spacious bedrooms, 2 modern bathrooms, a heated pool, and a welcoming living area for your comfort.

area36-luxury-chalet.title: Area36 Luxury Chalet
area36-luxury-chalet.description: A spacious chalet with 5 bedrooms and 4 bathrooms. Features both indoor and outdoor pools for a comfortable and enjoyable stay.

qafqaz-riverside-chalet.title: Qafqaz Riverside Chalet
qafqaz-riverside-chalet.description: Comfortable chalet with 4 bedrooms, 4 bathrooms and a heated pool. Perfect for families or groups looking for a relaxing stay.

area36-magnolia-harmony.title: Area36 Magnolia Harmony
area36-magnolia-harmony.description: Spacious chalet offering 3 bedrooms and 1 bathroom, plus a pool to unwind after a day of exploring.

area36-milano-deluxe.title: Area36 Milano Deluxe
area36-milano-deluxe.description: This home features 4 bedrooms and 3 bathrooms, offering comfortable accommodation for up to 9 guests.

qafqaz-falcon-chalet.title: Qafqaz Falcon Chalet
qafqaz-falcon-chalet.description: A stylish and cozy chalet with 3 bedrooms and 3 bathrooms. Ideal for a peaceful and relaxing escape in the heart of nature.

qafqaz-wooden-chalet.title: Qafqaz Wooden Chalet
qafqaz-wooden-chalet.description: A charming wooden chalet with 3 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, and a heated pool. Perfect for a cozy stay in the mountains.

qafqaz-rolling-bungalow.title: Qafqaz Rolling Bungalow
qafqaz-rolling-bungalow.description: Spacious and comfortable chalet with 4 bedrooms and 4 bathrooms. Features both indoor and outdoor pools for a unique experience.
